name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Scheduled Cron Task/Job - Linux
notes:
This Building Block detects the use of cron utility to create a scheduled job.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Alejandro Ortuno, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Scheduled Cron Task/Job - Linux
SIGMA Description: Detects abuse of the cron utility to perform task scheduling for initial or recurring execution of malicious code. Detection will focus on crontab jobs uploaded from the tmp folder.

Original Author: Joseliyo Sanchez, @Joseliyo_Jstnk
SIGMA Title: Crontab Enumeration
SIGMA Description: Detects usage of crontab to list the tasks of the user


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Scheduled Cron Task/Job - Linux on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Attempt
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of crontab

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/tmp/%' or LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%/tmp/%') or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%crontab –l%' or LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%crontab –l%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Scheduled Cron Task/Job - Linux on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Attempt
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of crontab

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/tmp/%' or LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%/tmp/%') or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%crontab –l%' or LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%crontab –l%') AQL filter query
